case_title: PARTIDA, JOSE R. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY TOW DPT.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PARTIDA, JOSE R. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY TOW DPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY TOW DPT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-25-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-24-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTFF FILING FOR MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, PAID $10 CASH, TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS.
DEFT.FILING ORDERED CONTINUANCE FOR 3/24/00 AT 10A M.EXEMPT.
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE TO CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. CITY TOW DEPT.RETURNED -FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARTIDA, JOSE R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CITY TOW DPT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-16-2000, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO FEB-25-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT: DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO BOTH PLFT AND DEFT.
